protocol.warning: Raw upstream variants are shown as stored; missing/uneven alternatives are not synthesized.

knownAnomalies: The paper reports 280 English MWEs; the current upstream CSV snapshot has 281.
The local score workbook has 279 scored English MWEs; dust storm and small fry are unscored.
Local workbook class counts differ from the paper's balanced experiment-selection counts.
